query: overcast gray flat lighting dull cloudy day no shadows depth collapsed
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — overcast gray, foggy collapsed depth, dull cloudy atmosphere, monotone bleakness

response.objective_caption: A wide landscape view of an open field covered in short vegetation or stubble stretching toward a long row of bare deciduous trees along the distant horizon. Heavy fog obscures the background, causing the trees to gradually fade from distinct trunks in the foreground to faint silhouettes farther away. The overcast sky blends into the hazy air at the horizon line with no visible sun.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A wide landscape view of an open field and a receding line of bare trees enveloped in heavy fog. The scene is rendered in washed-out, desaturated monotone gray tones with oppressively low contrast that eliminates clear separation between land, trees, and sky. The suffocating atmospheric haze and barren setting evoke a heavy sense of melancholy, isolation, and unease.
